title: Born in the U.S.A.
why_this_song: Born in the U.S.A. by Bruce Springsteen (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Born down in a dead man's town"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Come back home to the refinery"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "They're still there, he's all gone"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Nowhere to run and got nowhere to go"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I'm a long gone daddy in the U.S.A."

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "born" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "born" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Born down in a dead man's town
Down in the shadow of the penitentiary

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Born in the U.S.A.", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Born in the U.S.A.", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Born in the U.S.A." in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Born in the U.S.A." em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Born in the U.S.A." to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Born in the U.S.A.", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
